3.q: Yeast cells of normal samples and fragments with introduced mutations groups grew well on the screening medium... cells of AcoMYB4 that were transformed into the yeast survived, suggesting that AcoMYB4 can directly bind to the promoters of AcoABI5 and AcoABA1 in yeast.
